implemented_highlights: Monorepo consolidation with backend history preserved via subtree import
Cookie-first API client standardization and RTK customer/supplier slices
Reusable UI primitives: DataTable, FormModal, ConfirmDialog, PageLayout
React Hook Form inline validation for customer/supplier forms
Lazy route loading + in-memory cached GET wrapper
CSV and XLSX report exports using exceljs
Optional Socket.io scaffold for inventory:update events
remaining_gaps: ESLint missing in both frontend and backend runtime environments
Frontend package-manager inconsistency (npm vs pnpm lock workflow)
Socket.io is scaffolded but disabled by default and not functionally exercised
manual_next_steps: Install and configure eslint/prettier in both frontend and backend, then rerun lint
Standardize frontend package manager and resolve lockfile strategy
Enable socket flags and run end-to-end event verification in a non-sandbox runtime
